Year of informal request data
- does not refer to the year the ATI request was submitted or completed
Month of informal request data
- does not refer to the month the ATI request was submitted or completed
Unique ID for the ATI Package
- It is possible to view the full details of the ATI Summary by visiting https://open.canada.ca/en/search/ati/reference/ {unique identifier}
